[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeCamera](../../TextmodeCamera.md) / lookAt

# Method: lookAt()

```ts
lookAt(
   x, 
   y, 
   z): this;
```

Set camera look-at target.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `x` | `number` |
| `y` | `number` |
| `z` | `number` |

## Returns

`this`
